narrative:
Fowler Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 932 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
